notes: Phase 4 (Zul'Aman) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins TBC Classic Retribution Paladin Dps gear guide — sourced from the original 2007-2008 Burning Crusade release (both raid tiers are already fully documented regardless of the TBC Anniversary realm's current progress). Enchants show the top-ranked pick per slot; the guide page lists further ranked alternatives. Gems are the general class/role recommendation from the guide's gemming section.

gems.name: Relentless Earthstorm Diamond (+37 crit, +3% crit damage)
Bold Crimson Spinel (+8 Str) — or Bold Living Ruby — used regardless of socket color to maximize Strength
Bold Crimson Spinel (+8 Str) — ignore yellow socket bonuses in favor of pure Strength
